updates.title: Editable Window/Door Defaults & R-Value Sliders
notes: Added editable window and door thermal defaults in New Project screen
New WindowEditView and DoorEditView with R-value sliders and preset buttons
Windows and doors now inherit properties from parent walls
Updated default wall R-value to 19 and ceiling R-value to 38
Sliders display both R-value and U-value in real time
Preset buttons for common window types (Single, Double, Low-E, Triple)
Windows and doors are now tappable for editing in Room Detail View
Added migration support for existing projects without new properties

updates.title: iPad Air Compatibility Fix
notes: Fixed app compatibility with iPad Air and non-Pro devices
Added clear device requirement messages for LiDAR features
Improved user experience across all iPad models
